title: Loud Horns
description: Adds the sound horns from Lethal Company!
body:
![Text: Man, I want those clown horns in other games too!", -You, probably.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85e1afa9ff059ab8cb3bda075e5776fb3b8fd598.png)

## **Yep, this mod adds those clown horns from Lethal Company.** ##
- Clown Horn: 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Makes the sound!!, its mostly useful to annoy your friends, but also makes mobs target you from 12 blocks away.

</details>



- Air Horn: 

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Makes a loud air blast sound effect that we all know and recognize, but also makes mobs target you from 24 blocks away.

</details>



- Loud Horn:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Three blocks tall, makes a world sound for all players, useful for communication.
(Not fully tested yet, let me know if it's not working properly).

</details>

## More Info & Other Details
- Loud Horns includes a server-side config file
- Feel free to use any of my mods in your modpacks!
